result.response_content_preview:
THOUGHT:
The search successfully retrieved the foundational paper "Do ImageNet Classifiers Generalize to ImageNet?" (Result 0), which directly addresses the intended citation need. This paper introduces ImageNet v2 and CIFAR-10 v2 to test whether models generalize beyond static, repeatedly optimized benchmarks, revealing significant accuracy drops (11-14%) for state-of-the-art models. It perfectly fits the goal of highlighting benchmark overfitting, dataset reproducibility challenges, and the gap between reported benchmark accuracy and real-world generalization. It is not already in the references list and will be integrated into the introduction and related work sections to support arguments about evaluation fragility and the need for continuous benchmarking.
